originalTitle: Should Gabriel have been sent off for Haaland clash?
originalDescription: Gabriel pushed his head towards Erling Haaland's face yet escaped with only a booking. Why did the VAR not intervene for a red card?

originalTitle: Konate says he is close to signing new Liverpool deal
originalDescription: Ibrahima Konate says he is "close to an agreement" with Liverpool over a new contract and there is a "big chance" he will remain at Anfield next season.

originalTitle: Redesigned ball could reduce heading impact - scientists
originalDescription: Scientists believe footballs could be designed to reduce the impact of heading after new research discovered the action caused a previously unreported pressure wave energy transfer to the brain.

originalTitle: 'By chance or choice, they have clicked' - why Man City will be champions
originalDescription: Match of the Day pundit Danny Murphy explains why he thinks Manchester City will beat Arsenal to the Premier League title.

originalTitle: Record-breaking Bayern win Bundesliga - now for the Treble
originalDescription: Free-scoring Bayern Munich swept to the German title for the 35th time. Now their sights turn towards completing the Treble.

originalTitle: Man City beat Arsenal to close gap in title race
originalDescription: Erling Haaland and Rayan Cherki strike as Manchester City beat league leaders Arsenal to close the gap to three points with a game in hand and pile more pressure on Mikel Arteta's side.

originalTitle: Dream derby result for Liverpool fans but huge summer ahead for Slot
originalDescription: Liverpool's 100th-minute winner at Everton moves the Reds closer to a Champions League spot - but issues still remain.

originalTitle: Police fire rubber bullets and detain dozens as Paraguay derby abandoned
originalDescription: Six police officers were hurt, while dozens of fans were detained causing a Paraguay first division game to be abandoned after 29 minutes.

originalTitle: Draper out of Madrid Open as Boulter draws Townsend in first round
originalDescription: The draws have been set for the Mutua Madrid Open, which begins on Tuesday live on Sky Sports.

originalTitle: Green treated for brain bleed after Daniels loss
originalDescription: Shadasia Green was treated for a brain bleed after her stoppage loss to Lani Daniels in New York.

originalTitle: White among the future stars at national finals: 'I proved people wrong'
originalDescription: Future stars of the sport showed their potential in the final of the England Boxing National Amateur Championships.
